name: Accessability
description: The Accessability utility provides a set of utility classes for improving the accessibility of elements in the interface.

accessability.title: Screen Reader Only
accessability.content: Using screen reader class is possible on all elements. When used on focusable elements, the element will become visible when focused, allowing keyboard users to interact with it.

description.focus: Removes an elements visuals but is still accessible for screen readers.

examples.title: Simple Screen Reader Only Utility
examples.description: Applying the accessibility utility class makes the element non-visible on the display but accessible for the screen reader.

screen-readers.title: Screen Reader Utility on Focusable Elements
screen-readers.content: Using screen reader class is possible on all elements. When used on focusable elements, the element will become visible when focused, allowing keyboard users to interact with it.

description.Default: Hides element while keeping it accessible to screen readers

examples.title: Screen Reader Utility on Focusable Elements
examples.description: Using screen reader class is possible on all elements. When used on focusable elements, the element will become visible when focused, allowing keyboard users to interact with it.
